Metadata.title: Skyler — Web Systems Engineer
Metadata.description: Skyler is a web systems engineer working across interfaces, content systems, infrastructure, deployments, servers, and self-hosted tools.

Hero.identity: Web systems engineer working across interfaces, infrastructure, content systems, and the machinery holding them together.
Hero.titleLead: I make websites, systems, and occasionally

About.p1: I build web systems from the interface down: websites, content architecture, integrations, deployments, servers, and the awkward glue between them.
About.p2: Most of my professional work lives behind NDAs. What escapes usually involves Next.js, MODX, Cloudflare, Docker, Linux, self-hosting, automation, or an unreasonable amount of CSS.
About.note: Lately I have been moving deeper into networking, hardware, cybersecurity, and the infrastructure underneath the web.

Portfolio.title: Work with the rough edges left in.
Portfolio.intro: A growing collection of production websites, systems, and unnecessary side quests. The website case studies use real work; the personal projects are sample entries until I add their final details.
Portfolio.personalIntro: Small tools, experiments, and ideas that became real enough to keep.
Portfolio.websitesIntro: Selected web work, documented beyond the final screenshot: decisions, systems, good calls, and things I would do differently.
Portfolio.designCredit: UI/UX design was created by a designer colleague. These case studies document my engineering and implementation work, not visual design authorship.
Portfolio.previewIntro: A mix of web work and personal experiments, with the decisions behind them included.
Portfolio.sampleNotice: Sample personal project — ready to replace with final project data
Portfolio.liveCaptureNotice: Live website captured at 1920 × 1080 in July 2026
